purpose: A safe contract between a future vision-language model and the Mindcraft command router.

input.image: One current Minecraft frame supplied locally; no player screenshots are committed to the repository.
input.instruction: Describe only visible, decision-relevant facts. Do not propose or emit commands.

output.summary: One plain-text sentence, 240 characters or fewer, with no command marker.
output.visible_blocks: Up to eight Minecraft-style block identifiers.
output.visible_entities: Up to eight Minecraft-style entity identifiers.
output.uncertainties: Up to four short plain-text uncertainty notes.

safety_boundary: The vision output is observation only, never an executable action.
A later command request must still pass through the existing text model and exact command allowlist.
Any invalid, multiline, command-like, or extra-field response is rejected and replaced by a fixed safe message.
The observation model must not be used to infer private real-world information from user images.
